conbody.p: Overview: As a CDI Manager, I need a CDS Performance dashboard so that I can analyze the individual and detailed performance of the CDSs and analyze their activity.
Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDE One Staff Management CDS Performance .
CDS Performance displays the following KPI Cards: Clarification Rate, Financial Clarification Rate, Avg Initial Review TAT (Hrs)

CDS Performance dashboard displays the following charts:
Reviews
Reviews by Payer
Clarifications by Impact
Clarifications by Type
Clarifications by Subject
Clarifications by Response
On the top panel, you can select desired values for the slicers (refer ) and the corresponding data gets filtered in the tabular chart.

Default Display: By default, the dashboard displays the data for the inpatient encounters for which activity has been performed in the last one calendar month. Click the ‘Reset’ button to reset both activity date and discharge date and select the required date.

entry.p: This KPI metric displays the 'Clarification Rate' for the selected time period. Out of total encounters reviewed, the percentage of sent clarifications with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED.
Clarification Rate = (Count of clarifications with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED sent for the reviewed encounters/Count of Initial Reviews performed)*100 Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations. Format: 25%
Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (Encounters with Financial Impact Clarifications /Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) )* 100). Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED / Count of encounters with an initial review date) X 100.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial or BOTH’ in the administrator configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.Format: 37%

row.entry: This KPI metric displays 'Avg. Initial Review TAT (Hours)' for the selected time period. The number of hours between encounter Admit Date/time and the date/time, the Working Review was first created.

entry.p: (Initial Review TAT (hours) for an encounter = Initial Review Date/Time- Admit Date/Time) hours.
Avg. Initial Review TAT(Hours) = Sum of Initial Review TAT(Hours) of all the reviewed encounters / Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews).
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations. Format: 150

conbody.p: The Reviews chart displays the data for Initial Reviews and Additional Reviews for each CDS in the selected activity date range.

entry.p: This metric displays the count of encounters with an initial review date/time in the selected activity date range.

p.note: Initial Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range. Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

entry.p: This metric displays the count of additional reviews performed by the CDS in the selected activity date range.Additional Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range. Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Additional Review Types:

ul.li: Clarification creation
Clarification modification
Working review modification
Worksheet creation or modification
Possible review creation
Possible review modification
Reconciliation assessment creation
Reconciliation assessment modification
Encounter Saved
Note creation or modification
Tracking Codes Addition or Modification
Encounter status modification

entry.p: Activity Type 'Post-Discharge Review' is not considered in the Additional Reviews calculation.

conbody.p: The Reviews by Payer chart displays the count of Initial Reviews and Additional Reviews performed against each Payer for each CDS in the selected activity date range.

ul.li: X axis displays the Payer names (Format : Payer Description (Payer ID)
This chart displays count of Initial Reviews and Additional Reviews against each Payer.

entry.p: This metric displays the count of encounters with an initial review date/time in the selected activity date range.

p.note: Initial Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range. Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

entry.p: Displays the Total Reviews. Total Reviews = (Initial Reviews + Additional Reviews).Review Date/Time (Initial Review and Additional Review dates) falls in the selected activity date range. Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

This metric displays the count of additional reviews performed by the CDS in the selected activity date range..
Additional Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
Activity Type 'Post-Discharge Reviews' is not considered as an Additional Review by the CDS.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations

conbody.p: The Clarifications by Impact chart displays the count of sent clarifications with Financial Impact, KPI of Quality Impact for each CDS in the selected activity date range.

ul.li: This chart displays the count and percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications, Quality Impact Clarifications and Both Impact Clarifications.

conbody.p: Info icon(text on hover): Encounter Status: Includes all encounter statuses except 'Review Not Needed'. ; Clarification Status: Includes all clarification statuses except 'Removed' or 'Retracted'.

entry.p: This metric displays the count of Financial Impact clarification with at least one instance sent in the selected activity date range.

ul.li: Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status ia not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p:
Displays the the below details:
Clarifications Sent : 25.
Financial Impact Clarifications: 15 (60%).

This metric displays the count of Quality Impact clarification with at least one instance sent in the selected activity date range..
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as 'Financial' and ‘Quality’ in the administrator configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status is not considered for this metric calculation.

Displays the the below details:
Clarifications Sent : 25.
Impact Clarifications: 5 (20%).

row.entry:
This metric displays the count of Both Impact clarification with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range..
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as 'Financial' and ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Both Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status is not considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p:
Displays the the below details:
Clarifications Sent : 25.
Both Impact Clarifications: 5 (20%).

conbody.p: The Clarifications by Type chart displays the count of sent clarifications against each 'Type at Reconciliation' for each CDS in the selected activity date range.

ul.li: This chart displays the count of sent clarifications with 'Type at Reconciliation'. Example: The count of sent clarifications raised by the CDS with 'Type at Reconciliation' as PDX, MCC, etc.
Both standard and custom 'Type at Reconciliation' values are considered. X axis displays the available 'Type at Reconciliation' (Both standard and custom).
Y axis displays the count of sent clarifications against that 'Type at Reconciliation' value
Tooltip: Displays Type at Reconciliation,Clarifications Sent

conbody.p: Info icon(text on hover): Encounter Status: Includes all encounter statuses except 'Review Not Needed'. Clarification Status: Includes all clarification statuses except 'Removed' or 'Retracted'. Standard and custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ are considered.
The Clarifications by Subject chart displays the count of sent clarifications against each Clarification Subject for each CDS in the selected activity date range.

ul.li: X axis displays the Clarification Subject
This chart displays count of clarifications sent for each Clarification Subject
Tooltip: Displays Subject, Clarifications Sent

conbody.p: Info icon(text on hover): Encounter Status: Includes all encounter statuses except 'Review Not Needed'. ; Clarification Status: Includes all clarification statuses except 'Removed' or 'Retracted'.
The Clarifications by Response chart displays the count of sent clarifications responded against each Response Type for each CDS in the selected activity date range..

ul.li: X axis displays the available Response Types.
Y axis displays the count of sent clarifications responded.
This chart displays count of clarifications for each Response Type.
Tooltip: Displays Clarifications Sent, Clarifications Responded.

conbody.p: Info icon(text on hover): Encounter Status: Includes all encounter statuses except 'Review Not Needed'. ; Clarification Status: Includes all clarification statuses except 'Removed' or 'Retracted'.

ul.li: Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date).
Instance Response Date may not fall in the selected activity date range.

Clarification Response:
For Activity Date - Displays Clarifications with Final/Not Final Response
For Discharge Date- Displays Clarifications with Final Response
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status is not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Allows you to select the activity date range.
Format: Between Date range, Example: 7/1/2020 - 7/31/2020.
Default: Last 1 calendar months date range selected by default.
Allows you to select the discharge date range.
Format: Between Date range, Example: 7/1/2020 - 7/31/2020.

entry.p: Allows you to reset the Activity Date range.
Tooltip: Use "Ctrl + Click" to reset both Activity Date and Discharge Date.

ul.li: Displays both active and inactive facilities in alphabetical order for the report which you have access.
You can select multiple facilities.
You can search the facility by Facility ID or Description.
You can search the Payer by Payer ID or Description.
Format: Facility Description (Facility ID).
Default: ALL.
Displays both active and inactive payers in alphabetical order associated with the facilities you can access.
You can select multiple payers.
"Unassigned Payer" displays data for the encounters that do not have a payer assigned.
You can search the Payer by Payer ID or Description.
Format: Payer Description (Payer ID).
Default: ALL.
Displays both active and inactive CDSs in alphabetical order associated with the facilities you can access.
The CDS Filter in all the reports displays the users with the CDS or CDS Manager role assigned.
An inactive CDS appears in the CDS filter if a review is available in the selected Discharge date range.
"Unassigned CDS" displays data for the encounters that do not have a CDS assigned.
Format: Last Name, First Name MI (CDS ID).
Default: ALL.

Displays the available patient types.
Example: Inpatient, Outpatient.
Default: Inpatient
Displays the list of available units.
You can select multiple Units.
You can search the Unit.
Default: ALL
Displays the list of available Admit Services.
You can select multiple Admit Services.
You can search the Admit Service.
Default: ALL
Displays the list of available Visit Types.
You can select multiple visit types.
You can search the Visit Type.
Default: ALL
Displays the available options for Weekend Only Stay- Y and N
You can select more than one option.
Weekend Only Stay = Y ( Unassigned encounters admitted after Friday, 6PM and Discharged before Sunday, 11.59 PM)

entry.p: The count of encounters with an initial review date/time.When Activity Date is selected , Initial Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
The count of additional reviews performed for the reviewed encounter.When Activity Date is selected, Additional Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
Financial Impact Clarifications: Clarifications with standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the administrator configuration.
Quality Impact Clarifications: Clarifications with standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the administrator configuration.
Both Impact Clarifications: Clarifications with standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ and 'Quality' in the administrator configuration.
Primary Rec Type = The Primary Rec Type (standard or custom) associated with the clarification. ;Other Rec Type= The Other Rec Types (standard or custom) associated with the clarification.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered. Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
